name: engineering-management-agent-toolkit
description: Engineering Management Agent Toolkit: skills and plugins for engineering managers and team leads, derived from James Stanier's Become an Effective Software Engineering Manager and Camille Fournier's The Manager's Path.

plugins.name: engineering-management
plugins.description: Skills for engineering managers and team leads — tactical day-to-day mechanics (first-week snapshot, manager toolkit, 1-1s, feedback and reviews, hiring, motivation, stress and pressure, information and politics, self-care, team health, career growth) plus longer-arc work (project breakdown, hard conversations, the annual career vision exercise).
